title: About submitting the prediction files.
content: Hi all, I have a question regarding the submission process. Do we need to submit all four test files after populating them with our predicted values, or is only a specific file required? Any clarification would be appreciated. Thank you.

comments.content: You do not need to submit any "submission file". You need to submit a notebook which reads the test files and creates the submission.csv, this notebool is then again run on a new set of test files.
